query:
INSERT INTO events ( title, slug, description, content_html, images, external_link, start_date, end_date, location, price, status, featured, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( 'Heart Coherence Workshop with Sonja Bloder', 'heart-coherence-workshop', 'Align Your Heart, Mind & Emotions. An immersive 2-hour experiential workshop through somatic movement, conscious breathwork, and mantra practices. Cultivate inner calm and clarity amidst stress and overwhelm.', '

🚨 This session will be held in ENGLISH // Sesión dictada en INGLÉS 🚨

What is Heart Coherence?

Heart coherence is a measurable state of physiological and emotional alignment in which the rhythms of the heart, nervous system, and brain come into harmony. In this state, the body shifts out of stress-driven survival patterns and into regulation, clarity, and resilience.

This immersive 2-hour experiential workshop is an invitation to move beyond theory and into direct embodied experience. Through somatic movement, conscious breathwork, and mantra practices, you will be guided to reconnect with your body's innate intelligence and the deeper wisdom of the heart.

Benefits

  • ✓Cultivate inner calm and clarity amidst stress and overwhelm
  • ✓Strengthen the heart–mind connection for deeper intuition and self-trust
  • ✓Balance the nervous system through breath, rhythm, and somatic awareness

About the Facilitator

Sonja Bloder

Certified Somatic Coach (trauma-informed), Breathwork Practitioner, Yoga Teacher, and Retreat Host.

Website: www.sonjaandyoga.com

Instagram: @somatic.embodiment.sonja

', '["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506126613408-eca07ce68773?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop"]', 'https://reservas.cancagua.cl/cancaguaspa/s/17d02af1-495c-426e-b42b-981495b85b77', '2026-01-17 10:00:00', '2026-01-17 12:00:00', 'Cancagua Spa, Puerto Varas', NULL, 'active', 1, NOW(), NOW() );
